_comment: Project-level Claude Code settings for the MailBOX repo. The SessionStart hook prints a coordination-protocol banner so any session sees Linear's active-epic state and the GSD entry-point requirement before touching code. Originated 2026-05-16 after a duplicate-work incident — see commit message + Linear comment on STAQPRO-336.

hooks.command:
cat <<'BANNER'
========== MAILBOX — coordination protocol ==========

This repo has a parallel Linear-driven design track. The M5 milestone is
active; parent epic is STAQPRO-336 (Draft quality roadmap). Before any
Edit / Write / modifying-Bash, satisfy ONE of:

  (a) Invoke /gsd:quick, /gsd:execute-phase, or /gsd:debug as the task
      entry point. The GSD skills run the Linear alignment scan first.
      This is what dashboard/CLAUDE.md 'GSD Workflow Enforcement' mandates.

  (b) If skipping /gsd, manually:
        - list_issues({ project: 'UMB Advisors MailBOX',
                        milestone: 'M5 — Production Box',
                        state: 'started OR backlog' })
        - list_issues({ project: 'UMB Advisors MailBOX', parentId: null })
      Read the matching epic + every 'Delivered' child for prior art.
      Post a 1-line intent comment on the closest matching ticket BEFORE
      writing code. The intent comment IS the coordination trail.

If no Linear epic matches the requested work, ASK before building rather
than inventing a new track silently.

Why this banner exists: 2026-05-16 — a session built a duplicate of
STAQPRO-340 because Linear wasn't queried first. Reverted via PR #108.
Don't repeat that. 30-second cost, hours saved.

=====================================================
BANNER
